title: Delaware: Delaware Personal Data Privacy Act (DPDPA) deletion & opt-out
summary: Delaware residents can request deletion of the personal data a business holds and opt out of its sale and targeted advertising, including through a recognized universal opt-out signal. The DPDPA took effect on January 1, 2025.
disclaimer: General information, not legal advice, and not yet independently reviewed — verify the current process and your eligibility before relying on it.
